title: EasySpaghetti
description:
this is a simple mod that lets you make spaghetti. very lightweight and dumb, I was bored 

!!FABRIC 1.20.1!!
body: This is a very simple mod that lets you make spaghetti sauce, noodles and meatballs. put them together in a crafting table and you get SPAGHETTI!!! (restores 6 hunger bars)
